title: Top View of Colorful Plant-Based Meal Prep in Glass Containers
description: A top-down view of a colorful plant-based meal prep setup featuring glass containers filled with fresh vegetables, grains, legumes, and herbs arranged on a wooden kitchen counter. The scene includes ingredients such as chickpeas, black beans, corn, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, radishes, sweet potatoes, kale, and fresh herbs like basil and parsley. Wooden utensils and cutting boards with chopped onions are also visible, illuminated by bright natural light.
